title: Cat-Alastor
description: The resourcepack that changes regular cat model with meme Cat-Alastor one
body:
# **OPTIFINE REQUIRED!!!**

## Cat-Alastor
This mod replaces regular _**boooring🙄**_ minecraft cat texture with **_ULTRA MEGA EXTRAORDINARY AND KOOL😎_** Cat-Alastor texture.

### Actual meme:
![Cat-Alastor meme](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b04638b87b36502df7d24aaf5fd02d1c293324.png)
### My minecraft model:
![Minecraft Cat-Alastor model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21a8000cae2a3e29265de4eaa3b33d25ce981f52.png)

Hope you'll like this rp, while having some _**JAMBALAYA!**_
